title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 486.905 - Electronic notaries, commission, registration
text:
486.905.  Electronic notaries, commission, registration. — 1.  Prior to performing electronic notarial acts, a person shall apply to be a commissioned notary for the state of Missouri.
  2.  A notary shall register the capability to perform electronic notarial acts with the secretary before notarizing electronically.
  3.  Upon recommissioning, a notary shall again register with the secretary before notarizing electronically.
  4.  A person may apply or reapply for a notary commission and register or reregister to perform electronic notarial acts at the same time.
(L. 2020 H.B. 1655)
